scope: Round 3 current-hash-only verification of F1, F2, F6, and F7. Previously passed items and the wide-suite attribution record were not reopened.

evidence: SKILL.md:8-15 contains no undefined numbered-section reference.
SKILL.md:83-88 names NORTH_STAR_ROADMAP.md, AGENTS.md, the relevant RUNBOOK.md section, and runs/manager/inflight_lanes.md as the hard-rules reading set.
A current-file search found no FABLE_OPERATING_MANUAL, BUILD_CHECKLIST, task-board, or numbered-section authority reference.
SKILL.md:113-123 uses the shell-safe assignment TIER=xhigh and expands it into model_reasoning_effort.
The exact dispatch block passed zsh -n after substituting only the pre-existing <short-name> token.
SKILL.md:125-127 moves the PPID assertion to a SEPARATE later shell and explicitly explains that reparenting occurs after the launcher exits.
A controlled nohup/disown launcher-exit probe independently observed os.getppid()=1 in the detached child.
SUPERSESSION_NOTE.md:11-12 records +122/-34 and SKILL.md sha256 cda6295d97ace988f6d14be6e5beec2b1941fbf6b23fe3d8e075c712ea4822f4; both match the current working-tree snapshot.
SUPERSESSION_NOTE.md:13-15 binds review.json, review_fix.json, and this final review_fix2 record while preserving the historical lane report unmodified.
SKILL.md:97-101 states objective_result enum PASS | BLOCKED | PARTIAL.
The same text reserves PASS/FAIL for acceptance-row verdicts, matching docs/racketsport/lane_report.schema.json.

verdict_rationale: All four Round 3 residuals are genuinely resolved on the recorded current hashes. No blocker remains within the bounded scope, so the combined governance artifact is approved for the exact amended whitelist below.

commit_whitelist_decision.reason: Retain all 13 previously approved paths and add the required final Round 3 ruling, review_fix2.json. Omitting it would leave SUPERSESSION_NOTE.md pointing to an unpreserved binding review record.

excluded_from_commit: All lane and review log files

suite_record.reason: Round 3 explicitly prohibited a wide rerun and reopening previously passed attribution work.

honest_issues: The historical shared-working-tree suite remains red and iteration-only; this governance ruling is not promotion evidence.
The 13 run-directory paths in the final whitelist are ignored/untracked and require explicit force-add when Track E stages the commit.
